description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a modern, rectangular layout, surrounded by a well-maintained green lawn and several mature trees. The structure features large, white exterior walls with multiple windows distributed across the facade, allowing for ample natural light. The front entrance is accessible via a paved walkway that leads from the street, flanked by two small shrubs and bordered by flower beds. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic, and the house appears to have an open-plan interior with visible partition walls. The property includes a driveway and a spacious front yard, with the rear and sides bordered by dense foliage for privacy. The overall design is clean and minimalistic, emphasizing open space and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard with mature trees and a paved walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, flower beds, and a clear view of the open-plan layout with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, and dense trees at the rear, with the driveway visible on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by thick trees, with glimpses of the back facade and some windows visible through the foliage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, side windows, and the driveway extending toward the front, with trees lining the left edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
